title: hymenophyllum convolutum
intro: Hymenophyllum convolutum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the convolute scale fern. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum convolutum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, which often involve drying and infusing the leaves to make teas, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
